issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.
The skill is vendor-locked to Google Cloud, requiring GCP-specific tools and services, limiting portability across platforms.

scenarios.name: Production cluster with HA primary and read pool
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses gcloud alloydb clusters create then gcloud alloydb instances create --instance-type=PRIMARY --availability-type=REGIONAL with database-flags cloudsql.iam_authentication=on, plus a READ_POOL instance via --read-pool-node-count; baseline often conflates cluster+instance and skips IAM auth flag.

scenarios.name: Add native vector search to a products table
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses CREATE EXTENSION google_ml_integration, the embedding('textembedding-gecko@003', description) function and a scann index with num_leaves; baseline typically suggests pgvector with ivfflat/hnsw and an external embedding pipeline.
